description: 知乎专栏发布流程（v1.0.3：图片等待逻辑修复——先等 5 秒让知乎处理粘贴再检测上传，精准定位正文编辑器避免选到标题）

steps.descript: 导航到知乎专栏写作页

steps.value: const result = []; document.querySelectorAll('[contenteditable="true"], [contenteditable=""], .public-DraftEditor-content, .ProseMirror, [data-placeholder]').forEach(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width > 0 && r.height > 0) { result.push({ tag: el.tagName, cls: (el.className||'').slice(0,100), ph: el.getAttribute('data-placeholder')||'', editable: el.isContentEditable, w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }); } }); return JSON.stringify({ count: result.length, editors: result.slice(0,8) });
steps.descript: 诊断：列出页面上所有可见的编辑器元素（contenteditable/DraftEditor/ProseMirror）
点击正文区（v1.0.1：扩展选择器兼容 ProseMirror/contenteditable）
steps.ai_intent: 找到知乎专栏写作页的正文编辑区并点击（可能是 DraftEditor/ProseMirror/contenteditable div）

steps.descript: 粘贴正文（v1.0.1：扩展选择器兼容 ProseMirror/contenteditable）
steps.ai_intent: 找到知乎专栏写作页的正文编辑区并填入正文内容

steps.descript: 等待 5 秒让知乎处理粘贴内容（图片开始转存上传）

steps.value: const editor = document.querySelector('.public-DraftEditor-content, .ProseMirror, [contenteditable="true"][data-placeholder*="正文"], [contenteditable="true"][class*="DraftEditor"]'); if (!editor) { const fallback = document.querySelector('[contenteditable="true"]'); if (!fallback) return JSON.stringify({ hasImages: false, reason: '编辑器未找到' }); } const ed = editor || document.querySelector('[contenteditable="true"]'); const imgs = ed.querySelectorAll('img'); let uploading = 0; let dataUrl = 0; let uploaded = 0; imgs.forEach(img => { const src = img.src || ''; if (src.startsWith('data:') || src.startsWith('blob:')) { uploading++; if (src.startsWith('data:')) dataUrl++; } else if (src.startsWith('http')) { uploaded++; } }); const loadingEls = ed.querySelectorAll('[class*="upload"], [class*="loading"], [class*="progress"], [class*="pending"], img[src^="data:"], img[src^="blob:"]'); return JSON.stringify({ totalImgs: imgs.length, uploading, dataUrl, uploaded, loadingEls: loadingEls.length, editorCls: (ed.className||'').slice(0,80) });
steps.descript: 诊断：检查正文编辑器内图片上传状态（data:/blob: 为未上传，https 为已上传）

steps.value: const findEditor = () => document.querySelector('.public-DraftEditor-content, .ProseMirror, [contenteditable="true"][data-placeholder*="正文"], [contenteditable="true"][class*="DraftEditor"]') || document.querySelector('[contenteditable="true"]'); const editor = findEditor(); if (!editor) return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, reason: '编辑器未找到，跳过等待' }); const startTime = Date.now(); const maxWait = 60000; while (Date.now() - startTime < maxWait) { const ed = findEditor(); if (!ed) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); continue; } const imgs = ed.querySelectorAll('img'); let stillUploading = 0; imgs.forEach(img => { const src = img.src || ''; if (src.startsWith('data:') || src.startsWith('blob:')) stillUploading++; }); const loadingEls = ed.querySelectorAll('[class*="upload"], [class*="loading"], [class*="progress"], [class*="pending"]'); const hasLoading = loadingEls.length > 0; if (imgs.length > 0 && stillUploading === 0 && !hasLoading) { return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, waited: Date.now() - startTime, totalImgs: imgs.length, reason: '所有图片上传完成' }); } if (imgs.length === 0 && !hasLoading) { return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, waited: Date.now() - startTime, totalImgs: 0, reason: '无图片，无需等待' }); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); } return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, waited: maxWait, reason: '等待超时，仍有图片未上传完成', stillUploading });
steps.descript: 等待图片上传完成（v1.0.3：每 2 秒检测一次，要求有图片且全部上传完才通过，最多 60 秒）

steps.value: const btns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], .Button')); const result = btns.filter(b => { const r = b.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; }).map(b => ({ text: (b.innerText||b.textContent||'').trim().slice(0,30), cls: (b.className||'').slice(0,80), tag: b.tagName, disabled: b.disabled })); return JSON.stringify({ count: result.length, buttons: result.slice(0, 20) });
steps.descript: 诊断：列出发布面板中所有可见按钮

steps.selector: //button[contains(text(),'确认并发布')] | //button[contains(text(),'确认发布')] | //button[contains(text(),'发布') and not(contains(text(),'草稿'))][last()] | //button[contains(@class,'PublishSubmit')] | //button[contains(@class,'submitButton')]
steps.descript: 确认发布（v1.0.2：扩展选择器兼容多种按钮文字/class，is_try 容错）
steps.ai_intent: 找到知乎发布面板中的「确认并发布」按钮并点击（按钮文字可能是「确认并发布」「确认发布」「发布」等）
